title: Renode emulation for ESP32-S3 Meshtastic boards
description: Add Renode board definitions for ESP32-S3-based Meshtastic boards (T-Deck, Heltec v3). Use virtual interfaces: SPI/I2C/UART stubs to peripherals, don't emulate full Xtensa quirks. Focus on running Zephyr firmware with LoRa + basic I/O. Software-only: leverage existing Renode ESP32 base, add LICHEN peripherals.
